title: RayUniverse
description: This mod adds things from my universe
body:
Welcome to RayUniverse, the must-have mod for Minecraft 1.20.1! This mod introduces a variety of new tools, armors, and more to enhance and diversify your gameplay experience.

Current Features:

High-Level Tools: Access a new range of tools crafted from rare materials, offering enhanced durability and efficiency. Perfect for explorers and miners eager for discoveries.

Reinforced Armors: Protect yourself with specially designed armor sets that provide maximum protection while adding a touch of style to your character.

Unique Items: Find and use special items that grant unique abilities and interesting advantages, making every adventure even more exciting.

RayDiamond, Block, and Ore: Discover the powerful RayDiamond, along with its corresponding block and ore forms. These rare and valuable resources can be used to craft some of the best tools and armors in the game.

RayPhone: Utilize the RayPhone with various useful apps such as:

Calls App: Make and receive in-game calls.
Notes App: Keep track of important information and plans.
Discord App: Connect with friends and join communities.
Messages App: Send and receive in-game messages.
Anti-Vuki App: Stay protected with the 100% Anti-Vuki Mode.
Creative Mode and Survival Mode Buttons: Easily switch between game modes.
RayArmor: Equip the new RayArmor with improved translations for an immersive experience.

RayPaint: Enhance your structures with RayPaint, a new feature that adds a creative touch to your builds.

RayHouse Structure: Explore and create new structures with the RayHouse feature, adding more variety to your world.

RayLeaves, RayWood, RayPlanks, and RaySticks: Gather and craft with new materials like RayLeaves, RayWood, RayPlanks, and RaySticks.

RayTools Crafts: Craft new RayTools using RaySticks for improved efficiency and durability.

"Are you Rayan?" Achievement: Unlock the special "Are you Rayan?" achievement as you progress in the game.

RayBiome: Explore the new RayBiome, filled with unique resources and challenges.

French Translations: Enjoy the game with added French translations for all new features.

RayDimension: Enter the new RayDimension, a unique world with its own set of challenges and treasures.

RayFlint: Utilize RayFlint for crafting and other purposes.

RayFlint and Steel: Use the new RayFlint and Steel for various in-game applications.

The Real Miner Achievement: Earn the "The Real Miner" achievement by entering the RayDimension.

Added Jvsilva: Discover the new character or entity known as Jvsilva, adding more depth and intrigue to your world.

Added Jvsilva's Pencil: Equip or use Jvsilva's Pencil, a special item with its own unique abilities or uses.

Join the adventure with the RayUniverse mod and enjoy all the new possibilities it offers. Stay tuned for future updates, as many surprises await! (Description will be updated with each new update.)
